elements.location_note: ▼ ระดับชานพักบันได (stair-landing level window, lights the stairwell)

warnings: This sheet (A-14) presents 3 door types (D1, D2, D3, circle symbols) across the top row and 5 window types (W1-W5, hexagon symbols) below/beside them — 4 cells top row (D1,D2,D3,W1), 4 cells bottom row (W2,W3,W4,W5). D/W numbering re-derived by position/type since the raw sheet's own per-cell symbol numbering restarts independently for doors (1,2,3) vs windows (1,2,3,4,5) and would collide if used verbatim as element_id — same convention used for the 1-story sister houses' equivalent sheet.

W5 is cross-referenced on elevation 2 (หน้า10, opening tagged pentagon/box '5' at the upper floor stairwell landing) and its note explicitly says '▼ระดับชานพักบันได' (stair landing level) — confirms this window lights the ST.2 stairwell, consistent with the stair detail sheets (หน้า21/22).

Content (door/window construction specs — aluminum frame/6mm glass/white powder coat, wood door 2x4 frame, PVC bathroom door) is consistent with the material list (A-01/A-02) which specifies the same aluminum/glass standards (มอก. 284-2530) program-wide.

Unlike the 1-story sister houses' equivalent sheet (which had an unresolved possible-duplicate window-type ambiguity), this house's D/W schedule reads as 3 clearly distinct door types and 5 clearly distinct window types with individually dimensioned cells — no duplicate-type ambiguity found here.
